title: OSPF Operation and LSA Propagation Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of OSPF neighbor adjacency formation, Link State Advertisement (LSA) propagation, and routing table calculation.
relationships: Sends Hello packets to discover neighbors
Exchanges Database Description (DBD) packets to synchronize LSDBs
Floods Link State Advertisements (LSAs) to describe network topology
Runs SPF algorithm on synchronized LSDB to calculate shortest paths
Installs best routes into the routing table
